lessons.title: Aid, Abet, Counsel, Procure — and Accessories
lessons.description: The foundation of secondary participation in Irish law is Section 7(1) of the Criminal Law Act 1997.

lessons.title: Common Design, Joint Enterprise, and Withdrawal
lessons.description: Let's establish the core principle first. Where two or more persons agree to commit a crime, each is liable for all acts done in furtherance of the common design.
